title: RNA Isolation
author: Natalie Brown
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.6hjhb4n

steps.title: ●Bring yellow tubes to hood, collect...
steps.instruction: ●Bring yellow tubes to hood, collect trizol and add to tubes

steps.title: ○During, make 70% ethanol on ice...
steps.instruction: ○During, make 70% ethanol on ice (3mL RNAse-free water + 7mL ethanol)

steps.title: ●In hood, collect top layer after...
steps.instruction: ●In hood, collect top layer after spinning and place into eppendorfs

steps.title: ○**take note of first volume and make all the same
steps.instruction: ○**take note of first volume and make all the same

steps.title: ○Mix 1:1 ethanol with supernatant, use...
steps.instruction: ○Mix 1:1 ethanol with supernatant, use same tip to transfer from eppendorfs into pink spin tubes

steps.title: ●Add 70uL DNAse soln to middle...
steps.instruction: ●Add 70uL DNAse soln to middle of each column, leave 15min RT

steps.title: ○Close tubes as quickly as possible...
steps.instruction: ○Close tubes as quickly as possible and keep on ice→ nanodrop
